deployment_evidence.production_promotion: PR #503 (feat/genspark-iso-excellence): Genspark.ai OpenAI-compatible client; complete ISO clause catalog (98->233 clauses, all 93 Annex A controls); 5-stage multi-agent evidence analysis pipeline; Statement of Applicability generation; audit pack download; evidence quality scoring; conformance statement generation. CI 24098660474 success -> staging 24098897065 success -> production 24099221804 success (headSha: b7714c78).
deployment_evidence.staging_smoke_results: Deploy to Azure Staging: success (run 24098897065); UX Functional Coverage Gate: success (run 24099221791)
deployment_evidence.prod_deploy_proof_v2: Deploy to Azure Production: success (run 24099221804, conclusion: success)
deployment_evidence.governance_note: PR #503 addresses 6-lens Fortune-500 WCS review. P0 fixes: ISO 27001 Annex A 84% unmappable (15/93 -> 93/93 controls); no Genspark integration; evidence report button non-functional; no SoA generation. P1 fixes: ISO 14001 missing 8 sub-clauses; ISO 45001 missing 17 sub-clauses; ISO 9001 missing 9.1.3/9.3; no evidence quality classification; no conformance statement generation. All CI gates passed. GENSPARK_API_KEY pending customer provision - wire into Azure App Settings when received.
deployment_evidence.pr_checks_passed: PR #503: CI 24098660474 success; Azure Static Web Apps 24098660496 success; Security Scan 24098660478 success; Frontend Tests pass; Unit Tests 1387/1387 pass; Integration Tests pass
changes_this_release: PR #503: GenspaarkClient - OpenAI-compatible AI client for Genspark.ai (api.genspark.ai; models: claude-opus-4-6-1m / claude-sonnet-4-6)
PR #503: AIProvider.GENSPARK enum + GENSPARK_API_KEY / GENSPARK_MODEL / GENSPARK_FAST_MODEL env vars; auto-selects Genspark when key present
PR #503: get_ai_client() factory priority routing: Genspark > Anthropic > OpenAI > any-key fallback
PR #503: ISO 27001 Annex A expanded from 15 to ALL 93 controls (A.5x37, A.6x8, A.7x14, A.8x34)
PR #503: ISO 14001 expanded from 12 to 31 clauses (24 level-2 sub-clauses - complete)
PR #503: ISO 45001 expanded from 16 to 37 clauses (30 level-2 sub-clauses - complete)
PR #503: ISO 9001 expanded from 31 to 37 clauses (9.1.2, 9.1.3, 9.3, 10.1, 10.3 added)
PR #503: Total clause catalog: 98 -> 233 clauses with normative requirement text in description field
PR #503: ISOComplianceService.generate_soa() - full ISO 27001:2022 Statement of Applicability from evidence links
PR #503: POST /api/v1/compliance/analyze - new multi-stage analysis endpoint
PR #503: GET /api/v1/compliance/soa - new Statement of Applicability endpoint
PR #503: EvidenceLink dataclass gains title/notes fields; compliance route builder wires them
PR #503: Frontend - Generate SoA button with full 93-control dialog and export
PR #503: Frontend - Audit Pack download button (JSON evidence pack)
PR #503: Frontend - Deep Analysis button in Auto-Tagger (5-stage pipeline, conformance statement display)
PR #503: Frontend - Evidence quality badges (Direct Objective / Procedural Record / Documentary) per result
PR #503: Frontend - Evidence snippet display per auto-tag result
